extra.reason: Phase 3 BeadsService done: typed read API (listIssues/readyIssues/showIssue), mutations (createIssue/claimIssue/updateIssue/closeIssue/reopenIssue), BeadsError taxonomy, CreateIssueInput/UpdateIssueInput, StubCommandRunner, 15 new tests. swift test: 32/32 green.

Phase 4 done: @Observable @MainActor IssueStore with reload (parallel list+ready), select/clear, mutations (create/claim/update/close/reopen + claimSelected/closeSelected) auto-reload on success, errorMessage on failure. Kanban-mapped computed columns (backlog/ready/inProgress/blocked/done) per PRD §5.1. Sort by priority asc then updatedAt desc. 10 new tests. swift test: 42/42 green.

Phase 5 done: KanbanColumn enum + KanbanStateMapper pure function in BeadsContract. Rules: closed→done, in_progress→inProgress, blocked→blocked, in readyIDs→ready, else→backlog. Unknown status falls back to backlog with isKnownStatus flag. IssueStore refactored to use mapper + exposes unknownStatusIssueIDs/hasUnknownStatus. 11 new tests (10 mapper + 1 store). swift test: 53/53 green.

Phase 5.5 multi-agent foundation landed (backend-only). Added AgentRole/AgentProfile+builtIns/PromptGenerator in BeadsContract, AgentProfileStore in BeadsWorkspace, Clipboard+TerminalLauncher in App/. 19 new tests; total 53→72 green. ContentView/WorkspaceViewModel untouched.

Fixed B1 (reloadTask identity check), B2 (status=ready maps to .ready), H1 (AgentProfileStore dedup against built-in IDs and within custom list, addProfile rejects built-in overwrite & dedups by id), H2 (BeadsService validates id on show/claim/update/close/reopen). 79 tests green (+7 regression tests).
Detail issue already exposes a Close… action that opens the close-reason sheet, so the requested close button flow is in place and working.

Phase 6 UI minimal selesai: NavigationSplitView 3-pane, list+kanban toggle, issue detail, mutation actions (Claim/Close/Reopen/Create), prompt copy, terminal launcher, debug panel. Sheet bugs (Close, Kanban width) fixed dengan distribusi sheet ke child view + explicit columnWidth.

Phase 9 Local Persistence selesai: RecentProjectsStore + PreferencesStore (UserDefaults JSON, @Observable), auto-restore di BeadsKanbanApp.init, Recent Projects card di WelcomeView, defaults wired ke Create+Close sheet. Bonus: tutup deferred M1 (namespace UserDefaults key di AgentProfileStore dengan migrasi legacy key).

Agent workflow generalization selesai (scope di luar PRD): tambah built-in Codex Code Executor + 4 capability fields (commandArgsTemplate, canExecuteCode, shouldClaimIssue, shouldCloseIssue) backward-compat via custom Codable init. Tambah Copy Command action + button gating per capability. 104 SPM test hijau. Catatan: nomor 'Phase 10' di title misleading — bertabrakan dengan PRD §10 Phase 10 (Testing Strategy).

Added decoder resilience tests for unknown fields and wrapped payloads, preserved raw JSON on BeadsError.jsonDecodeFailed via IssueStore state, and exposed the latest decode failure in the debug panel alongside command history.

Done column window 24h: BeadIssue tambah closedAt, BeadsService.closedIssues calls 'bd list --status=closed --json', IssueStore fetch+filter pakai injected now() + doneVisibilityWindow (default 24h from AppPreferences), fail-soft kalau bd lama tidak support flag. 5 new tests: service call shape, fresh-closed populates Done, stale filtered out, zero window skips fetch, fetch failure silent. swift test 112 hijau, app build SUCCEEDED.

Expanded BeadsAppError to the PRD 8.1 taxonomy with user-facing messages and recovery suggestions, mapped bd/service/validator failures into the new cases, and added tests for every case plus the new error translations.
Added actionable setup hints in the welcome validation UI for missing .beads, missing AGENTS.md, and missing bd CLI, with per-hint copy-to-clipboard commands and model tests for hint selection.

Review column + bd human workflow shipped. AgentProfile.shouldRequestHumanReview baru (decodeIfPresent backward-compat). Built-in Claude/Codex Executor: shouldCloseIssue=false + shouldRequestHumanReview=true. KanbanColumn.review (urut: Backlog→Ready→InProgress→Review→Blocked→Done). Mapper: label 'human' AND status != closed → .review (closed wins). BeadsService.addLabel calls 'bd update --add-label'. IssueStore.requestHumanReview + reviewIssues computed. PromptGenerator executorTemplate branches on flags (review vs close vs noop). UI: Request Review button (executor only), Close jadi 'Approve & Close…' saat issue di Review, gating Close di-relax supaya human user bisa close. 8 test baru (3 mapper + 1 profile + 2 prompt + 1 service addLabel + 1 service blank-reject + 1 store), total 127 hijau. App build SUCCEEDED.
Added assignee avatar metadata and resolver, rendered assignee badges in kanban cards, list rows, and detail view, and covered Codex/Claude/initials fallback with tests.
Added ignore rules for local build, cache, derived data, and tool workspace outputs.
Implemented worktree preflight filtering for passive Beads export noise while keeping real dirty files blocking; tests pass.
Implemented the console v2 changes currently in the worktree and verified with swift test.
Updated the Spec Writer prompt and regression test so acceptance criteria are written as concise bullet points instead of a paragraph.
Added Launch Setup action in WelcomeView, wired it to the safe terminal launcher, and reused workspace setup hints for generic Beads bootstrap.
Worktree launches now proceed even when the source tree is dirty, so parallel worktree runs are no longer blocked by unrelated local changes.
Added AGENTS.md references to prompt templates and covered with tests

Combined assign+launch wired in IssueCardView context menu and IssueDetailView assignee picker. AgentProfileStore.executorProfile resolver routes claude/codex/other to canonical executor profile; AppViewModel.assignAndLaunchIfExecutor reuses launchAgentInWorktree (auto-claims). Humans/empty fall through to plain assignee update. 264 tests hijau; ./run-app build sukses.

done: vendored DM Sans and Syne font files, registered them at app launch, switched WorkstationTheme body/label to DM Sans and display to Syne, and applied DM Sans as the default root font. Verified with swift test and xcodebuild Debug build.
Successfully removed the Analyze Backlog button and entry points from the sidebar UI and verified build/test suite.

Fixed terminal display bug when launching AI agents. Changes: (1) Removed backslash double-escaping in TerminalLauncher.escapeForAppleScript — only quotes are escaped now, preserving shell escapes like " from PromptGenerator. (2) Added empty-path guard in makeCDCommand to prevent 'cd &&' when projectURL.path is empty. (3) Moved TerminalLauncher.swift from App/ to Sources/BeadsWorkspace/ for testability. (4) Added 9 TerminalLauncher unit tests covering path quoting, AppleScript escaping, shell escape preservation, and empty path handling. (5) Regenerated Xcode project with xcodegen. All 286 tests pass. Build succeeds.

Fixed: folder+branch now detected as reusable worktree (not blocked). Added cleanupOrphanWorktree() for stale cases. UI shows blue 'Existing worktree found' card with Launch/Cleanup actions. 301 tests pass, build succeeds.

Menyelesaikan perbaikan bug peluncuran terminal untuk AI Agent (Workstation-gei).

Detail Perubahan:
1. Menambahkan penanganan kesalahan `osascript` yang kuat di `TerminalLauncher.swift` menggunakan `Pipe` standar error dan `waitUntilExit()`. Sekarang kesalahan dari AppleScript tidak lagi ditelan, melainkan dilaporkan secara transparan.
2. Memperbaiki fungsi `escapeForAppleScript` untuk melakukan escaping pada karakter backslash (`\`) terlebih dahulu sebelum double-quote (`"`), menyelesaikan kesalahan sintaksis `(-2741)` AppleScript secara tuntas.
3. Menambahkan kunci plist `NSAppleEventsUsageDescription` di target `project.yml` dan meluncurkan ulang Xcode project generation menggunakan xcodegen. Ini memastikan macOS akan meminta izin Automation pengguna alih-alih memblokir secara diam-diam.
4. Memperbaiki logika klaim isu di `AgentLaunchFlowCoordinator.swift` agar lebih toleran. Jika klaim gagal karena isu telah diklaim oleh agen yang bersangkutan, atau jika statusnya sudah diubah ke in_progress, peluncuran agen tidak akan terblokir dan terminal tetap dapat dibuka.

Lokasi Elemen Baru/Berubah di UI:
- Tombol 'Run Agent' atau 'Run in Worktree' pada Panel Detail Isu (bagian kanan Kanban board).
- Panel Konsol/Activity Log yang menunjukkan log aktivitas peluncuran agen.

Panduan Uji Coba Manual Langkah demi Langkah:
1. Pastikan database Beads prime aktif.
2. Buka aplikasi Workstation.
3. Pilih salah satu isu pada kolom Kanban (misalnya 'Workstation-gei').
4. Pada panel sebelah kanan, pilih Agent (misalnya 'Gemini Code Executor' atau 'Claude Code Executor').
5. Klik tombol 'Run Agent' atau 'Run in Worktree'.
6. Sistem akan memicu popup sistem macOS meminta izin Automation untuk mengendalikan Terminal.app jika dijalankan untuk pertama kali. Setujui permintaan tersebut.
7. Terminal window baru akan berhasil terbuka, masuk ke path direktori kerja proyek (cd '/path/ke/proyek'), dan menjalankan perintah eksekusi kode agen secara lancar tanpa korupsi tanda kutip atau backslash.
Tested by user and successfully working.
Fixed all Swift compiler and AppKit layout manager/elasticity warnings and errors on macOS 15. The application builds cleanly and all 304 unit tests pass successfully.

Menyelesaikan perbaikan UI/UX pada Workflow Copilot:
1. Board Selection Guard: Saat pengguna berada di panel Copilot, melakukan multi-select issue pada papan Kanban tidak akan mengalihkan panel detail ke Bulk Action. Panel detail akan tetap di .copilot mode sehingga pengguna dapat berinteraksi dengan issue yang baru saja dipilih.
2. Compact Chips: Chip context issue di bagian bawah input text field pada panel Copilot sekarang hanya menampilkan kode issue (ID, contoh: Workstation-jwh) tanpa judulnya, menjaga input container tetap bersih. Judul lengkap issue ditampilkan sebagai tooltip bantuan (.help) saat pointer berada di atas chip tersebut.
3. Hover & Scale Animations: Tombol tambah (+) dan tombol kirim (arrow.up) pada bagian bawah input text field telah dirancang ulang agar memiliki animasi hover yang halus (skala membesar 1.05, perubahan warna background dan border, serta transisi warna ikon) dengan animasi kemudahan (ease-out).

Langkah Uji Coba Manual:
1. Jalankan aplikasi Workstation.
2. Buka panel Copilot di sebelah kanan (detail pane mode .copilot).
3. Pilih beberapa issue di papan Kanban dengan menahan tombol Cmd atau Shift sambil mengklik kartu issue. Pastikan panel Copilot tetap terbuka dan tidak berubah menjadi Bulk Action.
4. Perhatikan chip issue yang tersemat di bagian input text panel Copilot sekarang hanya menampilkan ID (kode) issue saja. Arahkan kursor ke atas chip tersebut untuk melihat judul lengkap issue sebagai tooltip.
5. Arahkan pointer ke tombol + dan perhatikan animasi hover skala membesar dan perubahan warna border & background. Lakukan hal yang sama pada tombol arrow.up ketika input tidak kosong.

Telah menyelesaikan implementasi pre-flight card untuk peluncuran agen di dalam panel Workflow Copilot. Saat pengguna meminta agen dijalankan lewat chat, sistem akan memunculkan pre-flight card interaktif secara instan (menggunakan deteksi trigger lokal) di mana pengguna bisa mengkustomisasi target issue, profile agen, model AI (strong/fast), toggle status (claim, merge, review), serta kustom instruksi tambahan sebelum diluncurkan di git worktree.
Implemented refined intent router checks and graceful fallback degradation to regular text messages for empty plan results.

Implemented trustWorktreeWorkspace helper in AppViewModel to automatically append newly created git worktree paths and standardized main workspace paths into trustedWorkspaces inside ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/settings.json before launching the agent. This entirely bypasses the interactive folder trust confirmation prompt inside agy.
Implemented persistent Copilot chat history saving in JSON file copilot-transcripts.json in Application Support, partitioned by active issue ID. Added unit tests for CopilotTranscriptStore.

Implemented the 'Clear Chat' action button (trash icon) in the WorkflowCopilotPane header in App/IssueRightPane.swift, which clears active conversation messages and resets token usage tracking. Added unit tests in CopilotTranscriptStoreTests.swift to verify that clear(forIssueID:) works correctly and integrates with persistent transcripts. Tested clean builds and confirmed 312 unit tests pass.
Implemented historical completed issues archiving system, dedicated History browser tab, and automated database pruning.

Successfully implemented local AI commit message drafting and commit/push execution in AppViewModel, GitWorktreeService, and LocalAIAction. Staged and committed missing LocalAIAction file, successfully ran and passed all 324 unit tests, and successfully verified the clean build of the Xcode project. Pushed all changes to origin.
